final_recommendation: Use the local gaussian_beam_focus requirement template -> template-only case -> fiber coupling preview path, inspect material candidates sio2, si, air, then review any calculator preview, workflow plan, and adapter preview via optiland. Observable previews supported by the adapter mapping: focal_spot. Real solver monitor results require explicit solver execution when applicable.
